neighborhoods.name: Charlotte Amalie East
neighborhoods.description: Cruise-tourism and commercial district centered on the West Indian Company (WICO) dock and Havensight Mall (first USVI shopping center, 60+ shops); dense with duty-free retail, restaurants, the Skyride to Paradise Point, and upscale lodging at Frenchman's Reef; walkable around the dock area, with safari taxis ~15 min to downtown
neighborhoods.character: Cruise commercial, tourist-dense, walkable retail core

housing.predominantType: Hotels, condo-resorts, timeshares, and upscale lodging

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Charlotte Amalie. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Charlotte Amalie

neighborhoods.name: Frenchtown
neighborhoods.description: Small French-Caribbean enclave west of the harbor with traditional French Huguenot heritage, restaurants, and a tight-knit community
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Charlotte Amalie's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Charlotte Amalie

neighborhoods.name: Hospital Ground
neighborhoods.description: Historic civic-medical district with the VI Department of Health offices, the Lutheran Cemetery, and the Franklin D. Roosevelt Veterans Memorial Park; subject of ongoing revitalization efforts

housing.predominantType: Mixed historic homes, government-adjacent buildings, and modest residential

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Charlotte Amalie

neighborhoods.name: Estate Agnes Fancy
neighborhoods.description: Residential area on Mafolie Hill above Charlotte Amalie with panoramic views of the harbor and West End, mixed housing from single-family masonry homes and bungalows to gated condos (Harbour House); cistern water and tropical landscaping are typical

housing.predominantType: Masonry single-family homes, bungalows, and gated condos with decks

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Charlotte Amalie
